---
title: Extensions
toc: false
listing:
    contents: 
        - "*.qmd"
    type: table
    fields: [title, subtitle]
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: order asc
    field-display-names: 
      title: Extension
      subtitle: Description
---

BDM datasets can be extended beyond cognitive tests and questionnaires to describe additional types of data and use cases. Extensions are authored as schemas in the same format used by the [Studyflow Modeler](https://behaverse.org/studyflow-modeler). This keeps the structure of extensions consistent across BDM datasets, studyflows, and tools.
